rationale.R1.7: Flags one likely mis-attribution and several missing references. The analysis is not exhaustive but identifies key issues.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents its findings as factual without explicitly stating uncertainty about the accuracy of the citations or completeness of the review.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope, with some minor deviations in focus (e.g., discussion of LLM novelty).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; the analysis focuses on improving the accuracy and completeness of the citations.
rationale.RX.5: Provides traceability for major rewrites but lacks detailed annotation for all changes.
